session.assistant:
Good, `__init__.py` has our changes intact. All the CI verification is done:
- 8/8 new `test_resolve_conflicts.py` tests pass - 263 PR command tests all pass - `ruff check` passes on modified files - `ty check` passes on the new command - 39 launch tests pass - TUI test failure is pre-existing and unrelated
Let me mark CI as complete and proceed to submit:
session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: erk exec impl-signal ended --session-id="${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}" 2>/dev/null || true && erk exec upload-impl-session --session-id="${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}" 2>/dev/null || true
Signal implementation ended and upload session
